concerns.text: Contract tests T008, T009, T018, T019, T025, T026, T027 are defined before the contract schema files (T040‑T045) that they validate are created. The schema artifacts must be produced first; otherwise the tests have no artifact to check.

Task T053 (collinearity diagnostics) and its contract test T054 are placed after model training tasks T020‑T024. Collinearity diagnostics are a prerequisite for model training and should be executed (and tested) before any training task.

Tasks T050 (fallback handling for lizard parse failures) and T051 (memory‑aware chunked processing) modify `code/data/extract_metrics.py`, which is already used by earlier pipeline tasks T010‑T017. These enhancements must be implemented before the pipeline tasks that depend on them to ensure the pipeline runs correctly on first execution.

Task T052 documents split proportions but is placed after the split operation (T016). Documentation of the split should precede or accompany the split implementation to keep the pipeline self‑describing.

Task T049 (integrate bug‑label reliability validation into the data pipeline) is scheduled before the preprocessing task T015 that creates the final dataset. The pipeline cannot enforce the precision check until the dataset exists; T049 should follow T015.
